item.title: A dancers dream never dies.. 🥹💫✨ Truly, I can say each year just keeps getting better. As dancers, we’re often told that youth is our prime, but with every year that passes, I feel stronger, more confident, and the most myself than ever before. Cheers to
item.description: A dancers dream never dies.. 🥹💫✨ Truly, I can say each year just keeps getting better. As dancers, we’re often told that youth is our prime, but with every year that passes, I feel stronger, more confident, and the most myself than ever before. Cheers to
item.author: annmarie.mm

item.title: Rain, snow or shine.. nurses show up 🧡💖🫶🏼✨ Happy Nurses week to all who show up everyday. When it’s hard, when it’s tough and when your patients need it most. To all the extraordinary nurses I have met along the way… treat yourself. You deserve more than
item.description: Rain, snow or shine.. nurses show up 🧡💖🫶🏼✨ Happy Nurses week to all who show up everyday. When it’s hard, when it’s tough and when your patients need it most. To all the extraordinary nurses I have met along the way… treat yourself. You deserve more than
item.author: annmarie.mm

item.title: The ultimate cool girl routine starts with @POSTGAME® Ice™ from @Rituo Brands ® ❄️🧊✨🧘🏽‍♀️🧘🏽‍♀️ Purchase in my Amazon storefront or online using code ANNMARIEICE to save 😎
